programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock attempts to reignite his career by interviewing a serial killer, who becomes the host of the symbiote Carnage and escapes prison after a failed execution.

programme.title: Robin Williams: Laugh Until You Cry
programme.desc: The comic genius with an electric mind, with a range of talent that left us breathless. The one who amazed and kept us entertained until the very end.

programme.title: Pistolera
programme.desc: When ruthless drug lord RAFAELLO murders the family of a little girl named ANGEL in a gangland hit in SPAIN, he makes one fatal mistake: Letting her live.

programme.title: Painted Horses
programme.desc: A young teacher with a storied past must win over a collection of impossible kids and become a balm in a troubled town in need of healing.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: A couple's break-up proceeds to get uglier and nastier by the moment as each tries to keep their luxurious condo from the other.

programme.title: Accepted
programme.desc: High schooler Bartleby Gaines is on his way to scoring a perfect eight out of eight college rejection letters - which isn't going to go over big with his parents.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Battleship is an epic-scaled action adventure that unfolds across the seas, in the skies and over land as our planet fights for survival against a superior alien force.

programme.title: Snow White And The Huntsman
programme.desc: The one girl threatening the Evil Queen's reign has been training in the art of war with the very Huntsman dispatched to kill her. Evil now fights destiny.

programme.title: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: Hundreds of years after civilization was destroyed by a cataclysmic event, a mysterious young woman, emerges as the only one who can stop London.

programme.title: Echelon Conspiracy
programme.desc: When Max Peterson receives a series of mysterious cell phone messages that promise him untold wealth, he soon finds himself the victim of a deadly international plot.

programme.title: Chinese Zodiac
programme.desc: A man searches the world for a set of mystic artifacts. The twelve bronze heads of the animals from the Chinese zodiac.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A paralyzed forensics expert and a young policewoman must work together to stop a brutal serial killer.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: When four armed robbers are killed in a failed heist, their widow with nothing in common except a debt left by their dead husbands' criminal activities take fate into their own hands.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Cereal Bars'. Gregg Wallace is in Essex at an enormous cereal bar factory, which produces 400,000 fruit and nut-packed treats a day.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E10 - Ultimate Sacrifice'. Sue goes ptarmigan hunting. Andy and Denise battle jumble ice. Jessie races in the Iditarod.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia...
programme.desc: 'Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan. S1/E3'. Reza is in Saudi Arabia to reveal the secrets of a hidden frontier on the brink of historic change.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Congo'. In the Congo, ingenious chimpanzees steal honey from hard-working sweat bees by engineering a large stick to smash open the nest.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Albania and the Adriatic'. Bettany explores Albania's Adriatic coast. She follows in Julius Caesar's footsteps in Oricum and Apollonia, visits the magnificent Ottoman town of Berat, and discovers Albania's own 'Braveheart'.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Ireland'. Ben ventures to the 'Emerald Isle' to visit Georg and Bettina, an elderly couple from Austria and Germany who made the Irish wilderness their home nearly 40 years ago.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Cereal Bars'. Gregg Wallace is in Essex at an enormous cereal bar factory, which produces 400,000 fruit and nut-packed treats a day.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E10 - Ultimate Sacrifice'. Sue goes ptarmigan hunting. Andy and Denise battle jumble ice. Jessie races in the Iditarod.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Wales'. Take a seat on the Cambrian Line and be whisked away on an unforgettable voyage to a lost world, with majestic castles and ingenious Victorian engineering.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E2 - Like Ghosts'. The Hailstones produce an original work of Inupiaq art, and Cole Sturgis ventures into the wilds of the Southeast on a life-or-death hunt.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E11 - Lincolnshire'. Ben heads to northern England and stays with host Paul in Lincolnshire onboard his 30-year-old converted military truck. He discovers why Paul traded living in a house for life on the road.

programme.title: Great Asian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Hue to Halong Bay'. Michael Portillo travels through the Socialist Republic of Vietnam. Near the formidable imperial city of Hue, Michael meets milliner Mrs Ngo, who teaches him how to make the iconic conical hat.

programme.title: Levison Wood: Walking With...
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Polar Bears'. Levison travels deep into the vast arctic wilderness of east Greenland to track down some of the most elusive populations of polar bears on the planet. But will he get up close and personal with one?

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Thailand'. Ben travels to Thailand to meet Paul and Sao, who he first visited in Cambodia. Paul and his family have build their version of an English castle.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E1 - Adapt or Die'. Sue pursues a bear. Jessie hunts small game. The Hailstones build a sled for baby Wade. Glenn hunts a moose.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia...
programme.desc: 'Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan. S1/E3'. Reza is in Saudi Arabia to reveal the secrets of a hidden frontier on the brink of historic change.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E12 - Sri Lanka'. Ben stays with Naveen and Anke who have made their home in the Sri Lanka's highlands. He uncovers why they swapped one of the biggest cities in the world for a simple off-grid existence miles from civilisation.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E3 - On the Auroras'. Alaskans confront the environment, and themselves, as winter bears down.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E9'. In Nepal, heavy snow creates danger for trekkers in the Himalayan mountains.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Congo'. In the Congo, ingenious chimpanzees steal honey from hard-working sweat bees by engineering a large stick to smash open the nest.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. More dramatic than a work of fiction. Family, power and feuding rivals. Dynasties returns.

programme.title: Great Asian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Jakarta to Borobudur'. In the heaving megacity of Jakarta, Michael Portillo uncovers Indonesia's colonial past as part of a Dutch empire and its rich history as a port.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Switzerland'. Bill Nighy narrates a journey that starts at Tirano and climbs up through the Italian Alps and lakes through into Switzerland, taking in the Landwasser Viaduct.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Before metal tools was invented stone age engineers were creating extraordinary structures known as megaliths. Huge in scale, they were precision-built to align with astronomical events.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Cape'. This episode reveals how the clash of two currents - one warm, one cold - creates the incredible spectacle of the 'sardine run' off the Great Cape.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Norway'. Ben travels to northern Norway inside the artic circle to catch up with Randi after five years. Randi has expanded her small holding and is now a crucial member of the local community.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Darkness Approaches'. Sue wolverine-proofs her camp. Ricko hunts Moose. Jessie rescues his boat. The Hailstones prepare for winter.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Spain'. Beginning near Leon, part of the famous north Spanish Pilgrimage, in the Picos de Europa mountains, this railway journey then runs through the Basque country before arriving in Bilbao.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S55/E8 - Fiesta Mexicana'. It's a fiesta as four chefs dial up the flavour with foods from Mexico! They combine a weird ice cream and a classic sauce and get creative with unusual chips.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E1 - Things To Bring: BBQ'. Ree Drummond is upgrading barbecues with fabulous portable ideas. She creates an eight-layer dip with adult flavours and a refreshing lemon icebox pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E2 - Chicken Four Ways'. Ree shares chicken recipes. First, she makes enchiladas, then a Florentine melt. She uses chicken thighs for a one-pan dish, plus, Teriyaki chicken with noodles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E3 - Feeding Now, Feeding Later'. Ree is getting ahead of schedule. She makes spicy stewed beef with a healthy broccoli salad, plus, she makes a pancake mix ready for a future breakfast.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E4 - Four In Hand'. Ree shares her portable food ideas. Breakfast bagel burgers are the perfect way to start the day and taco chicken Caesar salad wraps are ideal on-the-go bites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E5 - 16-Minute Summertime'. Ree makes beef skewers, veg and blue cheese mayo for a quick summertime dinner. Plus, she whips up Pesto chicken and blueberry, lemon and ricotta bruschetta.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E6 - Project Pens'. Ree cooks a hearty feast for the cowboy crew. She makes pork chop sandwiches and homemade pickles. For dessert, she bakes mini lemon and lime cupcakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E7 - Take Three'. Ree makes breakfast, lunch and dinner with three ingredients. To start the day, she makes a ham and cheese loaf, then penne pecorino and mango chicken salsa for dinner.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E8 - Make It Easy'. Ree is making four easy recipes. She makes use of her multicooker to shorten the cooking times like her roasted vegetable soup from the freezer and her Irish oats.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E9 - Happy Hour'. Ree makes the perfect appetizers to enjoy alongside some cocktails. She prepares Bloody Mary shrimp cocktails, steak and brie bites and buffalo devilled eggs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E10 - Ask Me Anything: All About Kids'. Ree answers questions from fans, both children and adults. She explains some of her favourite, easy recipes that are popular with everyone.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S19/E11 - Four Under 40'. Ree Drummond whips up four delicious recipes in under 40 minutes. She makes pesto chicken, Cajun veggie pasta, shrimp puttanesca and finally skirt steak with bok choi.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S24/E4 - Supermarket Swaps'. Katie Lee uses Sunny Anderson's groceries to whip up spicy pecan-crusted chicken thighs. Plus, Jeff Mauro makes tofu ice cream with mixed berry sauce.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E1'. Four chefs compete in a delicious battle to make a beloved food out of this world. A spicy surprise means the noodle appetizers might come with a kick.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E1 - Film Crew Takeout'. Ree Drummond cooks for her kid crew after a day of filming. She makes veggie packed burritos, tortilla soup, s'mores brownies and baked BBQ ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E2 - California Cooking'. The sun is shining, and Ree is doing some California-style cooking. She makes wine-roasted chicken with pistachio pesto pasta and vibrant cauliflower tacos.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E3 - 16-Min Meals: Cowboy Favorites'. Ree shares yummy 16-minute recipes for cowboys and cowgirls. She makes steak medallions and potatoes, and gnocchi with chorizo and corn.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E4 - 3 Apps And A Cocktail'. Ree prepares for cocktail hour with delicious dishes. They include BBQ shrimp cocktail, buffalo chicken meatball skewers and blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E5 - Summer Celebration'. Ree celebrates the arrival of summer! On the menu are roasted brisket sliders, a big grilled veggie salad and fizzy sparkling sangria.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E6 - Social Sensations'. Ree tries her hand at internet-famous eats! Delicious dishes include Mexican birria tacos, burnt cheesecake with blackberries and corn ribs.

programme.title: Haunted Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Calling All Ghostbusters'. Three gingerbread artists vie for a spot in the finale as they create pieces that celebrate the 35th anniversary of the movie Ghostbusters.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E2 - Asian And American'. Guy goes to Alaska to try a Korean-Mexican joint rolling out kimchi burritos before heading to New Mexico for funky fusion pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E3 - Meaty, Cheesy And Sweet'. Guy Fieri loads up on things meaty, cheesy and a little sweet, like wild waffles in Anchorage, Alaska, and sizzling steak tacos in Aspen, Colorado.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S48/E1 - Grudge Match: Battle 1'. A $100,000 grand prize is up for grabs in this extraordinary five-part tournament event, featuring some of the most brilliant stars of the game.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Alex Vs Frozen Desserts'. Eric Adjepong challenges three cool treat experts to take on Alex Guarnaschelli, and they'll have to strategize on how to freeze her out in round one.

programme.desc: 'S9/E6 - Retro Love'. The bakers go retro as they celebrate the '50s and '60s. They make soda shop cupcakes and shaggy cakes dedicated to all those groovy lovers out there.

programme.desc: 'S20/E1 - The Final Shot'. Robert Irvine heads to Smith's Soul Food Bistro in Gastonia, North Carolina, where owner Cheryl is an ex-basketball coach on a mission to help her community.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S36/E3 - Eastern Southern'. Guy Fieri heads east to get a taste of the South. He checks out meatloaf in New Hampshire, extra-spicy shrimp in North Carolina and seafood stew in Florida.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E6 - Uni Versed?'. The chefs put their sea urchin knowledge to the test in the appetiser round. Then, a corn cake meets a classic candy in the dessert basket.

programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Titans Vs Ayaka Guido'. Ayaka Guido, the right hand to Chef Jean George Vongerichten, comes prepared with her Michelin training to take on the Titans.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Going Whole Hog'. The final two pitmasters compete to be Master of 'Cue. Bobby Flay and Michael Symon transform from mentors to sous chefs in a battle for the ages.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S50/E2 - Time Capsule: '90s Foods!'. The chefs set out to make trendy 1990s foods yummy for a new millennium. The combination of ingredients in the first basket confuses the competitors.

programme.title: Armando's Asian Twist
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Afternoon Tea Classics'. Armando picks delectable fruits and prepares a dessert for afternoon tea. Later, he visits the area where Queen Elizabeth II's Oriental Tea is grown.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - Everything's Coming Up Floral'. Molly Yeh challenges 12 bakers to make fruit tarts that showcase their distinct personalities. Then, the bakers must create a floral bonanza cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S30/E9 - Spinning The Globe'. Guy Fieri is checking out eateries with global flavours. After a shocking twist on tacos in Kansas City, a food truck in Texas serves up meatless Mexican food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S30/E10 - From Australian To Asian'. Guy Fieri is on the lookout for worldwide flavours. In Kauai, a Japanese-Hawaiian eatery is putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E1 - Welcome To Camp Devil's Food'. The 10 bakers pay tribute to 1980s classic slasher movies at Camp Devil's Food Lake. They tackle 'cereal killer' pies and mega cakes.

programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - After The Rain'. Elizabeth makes French dip sandwiches and magic layer bars to thank the crew for working to get the ranch back into shape during a rainy winter.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Raiders Of The Lost Keg'. Kevin and Grant find a way to chill a drink in less than a minute. Plus, they play backyard astronaut in an attempt to send a camera to the edge of space.

programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - African Savannah'. Bear travels across the African plains, demonstrating essential survival skills. Discover how to build a shelter, trap small birds and manoeuvre through dense vegetation.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Why Tortoise Has A Broken Shell'. You see there was a time when Tortoise's shell was all shiny and smooth. How did Tortoise's shell become bumpy? Tales from Africa.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Richard gambles his own money on a 1970 Mark II Jensen Interceptor with plans to restore it to factory specification. Plus, the guy's head to the London Classic Car Show.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: 'S24/E40'. We've got two Japanese mid-size pick up's looking to take on the established American manufacturers at their own game. Plus, Honda brings the prelude from the dead.

programme.title: Rev
programme.desc: 'S24/E40'. Groundbreaking vehicles made from surprising materials are paving the way for a sustainable future. A man in builds all-terrain vehicles for the hilly terrain in Lesotho.

programme.title: European Le Mans Series
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. It's round four of the ELMS season, on a very special track with just over seven kms long with 19 corners, including some absolutely iconic ones and Raidillon.

programme.title: The Guild Garage
programme.desc: 'S6/E4'. Brad finishes a 1964 Pontiac GTO whose owner passed away. When the family arrives with the owner's ashes and a plan to drive back in the car, they are overwhelmed by the beauty.

programme.title: Kasi Car Culture
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Sbu learns how to ride a motorbike at the Soweto Motorbike School. Khutso attends legendary spinner Alistair Abraham's memorial remembering one of their own.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Richard finds a classic mini that needs restoring. And, with the costs of the new workshop escalating, he sells some of his own cars to help pay for the business.

programme.title: Dream Builds On Wheels
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Jimmy meets a family of six who are converting a double-decker bus into a campervan. Plus, Jimmy seeks expert help for his own dream build on wheels.

programme.title: Isle of Man TT HL
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. History has been made here this week, with Michael Dunlop taking his 26th career win in the SuperSport class on Saturday equalling the all time record.

programme.title: ALL THINGS MOTORING INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: 'S8/E8'. We are back with part 2 of Festival of Motoring, as we start our countdown for our 100th episode later this year. This is a show where speed and inspiration continues.

programme.title: The Bike Show
programme.desc: 'S24/E41'. This week on The Bike Show, the Honda Africa Twin isn't all that, a look at how your motorcycle doesn't just fall over, and then some slams MotoGP bikes.

programme.title: #CarClipz
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. We dive into a hilarious mix of delivery mishaps, watch as we crack up at Temu's quirky cars and marvel at some seriously cool bouncer cars.

programme.title: Fast Lane
programme.desc: 'S3/E16'. Sebastian Vettel won 4 world titles at Red Bull made him the hottest property, but he has not achieved everything he set out to do at Ferrari. Can he recapture the spark.

programme.title: Veloce Supercar Run: Kruger Edition
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Join the Veloce lifestyle and automotive club on an epic 4-day journey from Johannesburg to Kruger National Park. Experience the blend of automotive passion and natural beauty.

programme.title: IGNITION GT
programme.desc: 'S24/E41'. Juliet gets behind the wheel of the all-new Hyundai Exter. Jetour makes its eagerly awaited South African debut and we spend some time with the Volkswagen ID. 4.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Wreck Recover Repeat'. Al Quiring is in a high-pressure race to open the TransCanada Highway before rush hour. Jordie faces a semi ready to split in two. A pharmaceutical truck plunges down a bank.

programme.title: Dream Builds On Wheels
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Jimmy meets a family of six who are converting a double-decker bus into a campervan. Plus, Jimmy seeks expert help for his own dream build on wheels.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - 2/2'. We're doing it big as Sbu takes his first driving lesson in a truck. Sbu is out and about talking to petrolheads at the festival of motoring. We also meet our second drag kings.

programme.title: Razor Customs
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 of 13'. The team visits a GTR specialist in a remote location before heading to East London ground pre circuit for drag racing some of the fastest GTR's in the country.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: 'S24/E41'. This week Mini Cooper brings us it's latest electric hot hatch back. We've also got a Ford Maverick pick-up truck with all the attributes of a race ready monster.

programme.title: Rev
programme.desc: 'S24/E41'. REV uncovers the surprising history of electric cars, from their early dominance to their fall from grace and eventual resurgence. We test a Lamborghini Aventador SVJ.

programme.title: Motor Mythbusters
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Leaking Radiator/Cars vs. UFOs'. The team tests if urine can replace radiator fluid and drives a truck with it. They also recreate a UFO encounter's effects on cars.

programme.title: Toyota Gazoo Racing SA Cup
programme.desc: 'S24/E5'. The fifth round of the Gazoo Racing SA Cup took place at a packed East London Grand Prix Circuit. Toyota's initiative is paying dividends with excellent on track action.

programme.title: Spa Classics
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. We're in the south of Belgium, over three days, the Spa Classic once again shows that it's the largest historic race meeting on the Ardennes circuit.

programme.title: ALL THINGS MOTORING INTERNATIONAL

programme.desc: 'S3/E2'. A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a chicken farm barn, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored to near perfection.

programme.title: Road Madness
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - 1/5'. A medical emergency causes chaos on the open road. Our truck cameras film accidents they have witnessed.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide

programme.title: Dear Zoe
programme.desc: An emotionally stirring coming-of-age story about grief. A teenage girl seeks support from her biological father and a juvenile delinquent after the death of her little sister.

programme.title: Honk For Jesus. Save Your Soul.
programme.desc: Regina Hall and Sterling K. Brown propel this funny church saga. In the aftermath of a scandal, the first lady of a megachurch tries to help her pastor-husband rebuild the congregation.

programme.title: The Stand In
programme.desc: This funny rom-com stars Drew Barrymore in a dual role. When Candy is sentenced to rehab, she sends her acting double, but things take a turn as her stand-in takes over her life.

programme.title: One Year Off
programme.desc: A fun comedy. An unexpected inheritance leads to old friends reuniting in the Caribbean, but when they extend their stay, they learn that paradises have their own challenges.

programme.title: Riki Rhino: The Bird Kingdom
programme.desc: A fun, family adventure. Riki, a brave rhino, and his duck friend Beni journey through a tropical jungle to find a magic seed that will help save their home from a foreseen tsunami.

programme.title: Tom And Jerry: The Movie
programme.desc: An animated musical comedy. Cat and mouse duo Tom and Jerry reluctantly work together to save a young girl from her evil aunt.

programme.title: The School Of Rock
programme.desc: This upbeat, endearing, musical comedy earned Jack Black a Golden Globe nomination as he gave a class of preppy students a music lesson in rock and roll they'll never forget.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Paddington's delightful adventures continue in this BAFTA-nominated sequel. After a beloved book is stolen, Paddington and the Browns must find the crafty thief behind the crime.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: Anna Faris stars in this crazy, zany comedy. A Playboy bunny is kicked out of the Playboy Mansion. She must now find a job and a new life.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone stars in this cult classic teen movie that follows the antics of a rich, popular high school girl as she tries to navigate the harshness of teen life.

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Golden Globe winner Steve Carell and Oscar winner Anne Hathaway are reluctantly paired spies trying to prevent a terrorist attack in this adaptation of the Mel Brooks TV series.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: A heartfelt and powerful film that follows the life of the late great reggae musician Bob Marley, from his struggles to his music and artistic endeavours.

programme.title: Poolman
programme.desc: Chris Pine directs and leads this star-studded quirky comedy. A Los Angeles pool cleaner is recruited by a femme fatale to help uncover corruption in a shady business deal.

programme.title: After
programme.desc: Based on the highly acclaimed novel by Anna Todd. A young woman meets a guy with a dark secret and they embark on a rocky relationship. Will they be able to survive it?

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: Vengeance is golden in this action film set during the last days of WWII. When an ex-soldier discovers gold in the wilderness, he must defend his loot and himself from Nazi soldiers.

programme.title: Your Lucky Day
programme.desc: The late Angus Cloud (Euphoria) drives this gritty, tension-filled heist thriller. A dispute over a winning lottery ticket spirals into a life-or-death hostage situation.

programme.title: Medieval
programme.desc: Starring Ben Foster and Michael Caine, this is an epic take on the true story of Jan Žižka, one of Czech history's greatest warriors who is said to never have lost a battle.

programme.title: Dead Zone
programme.desc: An elite team of soldiers who, to stop the collapse of humanity, descend on a radiation-poisoned town and perform the ultimate stealth mission using high-tech armour and weapons.

programme.title: Dying To Be Perfect
programme.desc: This thriller explores the cost of perfection. A recently widowed woman must uncover the secrets of her seemingly perfect daughter when she starts abusing drugs and disappears.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: A tongue-in-cheek horror flick about several weird and wacky characters who tangle with a giant Asian crocodile who has decided to settle down in a peaceful Maine lake.

programme.title: Rift
programme.desc: A gripping action thriller. Jason Cole, an FBI Agent, appears to have it all until his past rears its head and propels him into a situation he could not have prepared for.

programme.title: Malicious Mind Games
programme.desc: A widowed mother takes a job as an overnight security guard. During her shift, she witnesses a murder, only to later discover the victim is alive and well.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: When a wedding planner falls in love with a groom, she decides the bride has to disappear.

programme.title: Undercover Brother
programme.desc: A silly slapstick comedy starring Eddie Griffin as an undercover spy who must foil the plans of a man who wants to reduce the entire population into mindless zombies.

programme.title: Breaking
programme.desc: John Boyega (Star Wars) is a desperate man in this poignant and pertinent thriller. A war veteran in mental and emotional turmoil holds several people hostage inside a bank.

programme.title: Snakehead
programme.desc: A high-octane action movie. A Chinese immigrant gets caught up in an international crime ring of human smuggling while attempting to make a better life for her family.

programme.title: Survive The Night
programme.desc: Action star Bruce Willis drives this home invasion thriller. Two robbers hold a disgraced doctor and his family hostage so that they can get treatment after a robbery gone wrong.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson is the ancient anti-hero in this superhero movie. 5 000 years after being given the powers of the gods, Black Adam is freed, unleashing his unique form of justice.

programme.title: Saw
programme.desc: A clever, captivating horror filled with gore, suspense and mystery. Two strangers wake up chained in a room. They soon learn they're pawns in a serial killer's twisted game.

programme.title: Jiu Jitsu
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage faces an interstellar threat in this sci-fi thriller. Every six years, an ancient order of jiu-jitsu fighters battle a vicious race of alien invaders.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - Jersey Shore Day'. A getaway to Atlantic City gets sexy when Vinny strips, family dinner heats up when juicy secrets are revealed, and Angelina has some choice words for Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation
programme.desc: 'S7/E5 - Straight to Seaside!'. The fam heads back to their old stomping grounds for a fun day of reminiscing, while Mike and Nicole engage in a very Jersey debate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: 'S35/E19 - Sterling and Nina Agdal XXXVIII'. Rob, Steelo and Nina Agdal hit the sandy slopes in 'dune damaged', meet people who play rough in 'terrorising toys' and discover that not all burgers are created equal in 'patty problems.'

programme.title: Baki Ya Lerato
programme.desc: After a wild night, a young man is forced to marry a girl he does not love. With an unplanned pregnancy threatening his happiness, will he proceed with the marriage?

programme.title: Madumane
programme.desc: Three matriculants devise a plan to get their mixtape to a famous Amapiano DJ, who's making an appearance at their rival school matric dance after party.

programme.title: Kings Of Soweto
programme.desc: A hardened criminal who's making a name for himself in the drug world, unexpectedly falls in love with a rebellious young girl, changing his outlook on life.

programme.title: Umkhwenyana
programme.desc: When Themba, a widower, finds love, his mother-in-law, Mam Selina, disapproves of his new lover. Themba tells Mam Selina he wants to propose, but she plans to disrupt the relationship.

programme.title: Pilara
programme.desc: When a toxic relationship comes to an end, the mother decides to cut all ties between father and child.

programme.title: Ibala
programme.desc: A young girl with albinism meets her fiance's family for the first time. However, they forbid him from marrying her and threaten to disown him if he does.

programme.title: Ntwana Yaka
programme.desc: With his partner, con man Zakes recruits a young boy into their crime syndicate. Soon, Zakes realises that he needs to reform after almost losing the boy.

programme.title: Molamu
programme.desc: Stunned by the loss of his father and humiliated by his peers, a boy's journey to manhood is ignited by the power of friendship and the art of stick fighting.

programme.title: Ngisak'khumbula
programme.desc: When they discover they have different dreams, a young couple drifts apart and breaks up. They soon remember why they fell in love in the first place.

programme.title: Uppercut
programme.desc: A title holding championship boxer gets into a car accident and loses his ability to do any sports. He finds a way to heal, save his gym and inspire others from his wheelchair.

programme.title: Amadreadlocks
programme.desc: When Wanele wears a dead woman's dreadlocks, the owner of the dreadlocks starts haunting her for stealing her man.

programme.title: Indodakazi Yami
programme.desc: A recently widowed man learns that his daughter is not biologically his when her real father rocks up one day demanding full custody.

programme.title: Ezibiweyo
programme.desc: A young man is kidnapped and taken to an illegal circumcision school. Together with his fellow initiates, they must fight their way to freedom.

programme.title: Ilifa
programme.desc: Once successful and very close, two siblings find themselves fighting for their parents' riches after they pass away suddenly.

programme.title: Osbali
programme.desc: Bhekumuzi challenges Tshepo to a day in his life as a taxi driver to prove his masculinity. Tshepo encounters problems with passengers, change and rival taxi drivers.

programme.title: Ngithanda Wena
programme.desc: A story about Jabu, a drug addict who decides to clean up his life, and Sizwe, a decent man who gives Jabu a second chance when no one else will.

programme.title: O'mang?
programme.desc: The son of a billionaire and his PA trade places when visiting a village. The PA is immediately treated like royalty while the actual billionaire's son lives happily under the radar.

programme.title: Grade 13
programme.desc: A graduate sees an opportunity to open an abet school in the village, but turns out that her idea is challenged as she gets the most thick headed adults as her students.

programme.title: Lekgarebe
programme.desc: A young man is preparing to marry the love of his life when he discovers the child his soon-to-be wife is carrying is not his.

programme.title: Mamodibe
programme.desc: A good Samaritan decides to assist a stranded woman. He gives her a ride home, unaware of what awaits him when she opens up her world to him.

programme.title: Ikhaya
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 of 13'. Cebile and Eddie's marriage is becoming strained and Eddie wants a divorce. Cebile will have none of it and threatens Eddie and Raisibe's farm if he goes through with a divorce.

programme.title: Grootboom And Sons
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 of 13'. MK is disappointed when Luthando chooses Didi over him. Mbulelo finally brings Imani and the baby home from the hospital, and Kefilwe's lobola negotiations are concluded.

programme.title: Bafana

programme.title: Inqubo Yothando
programme.desc: When a radio DJ falls for a beautiful new stranger in town, he risks losing the love of his life to catch the stranger's attention.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Battle Of House

programme.title: Ted K

programme.title: Secret Society Of Lies
programme.desc: A dramatic thriller. Targetted by a secret fraternity, a brilliant student plans to expose them, but she soon realises the fraternity has ties to the dean and high-ranking officials.

programme.title: Alone In The Dark
programme.desc: Bri is recently divorced and under house arrest due to her ex-husband's crimes, but when a stalker shows up, he seems to have control over her surroundings.

programme.title: Girl Taken
programme.desc: The gripping true story of two Cape Town parents whose daughter was stolen from the hospital at birth. She's found 17 years later, but their reunion is not what they hoped for.

programme.title: Mayberry Man
programme.desc: A fun, heartwarming family movie with good life lessons. When an arrogant movie star is busted for speeding in a small Southern town, he's sentenced to attend a week-long festival.

programme.title: A Baby At Any Cost
programme.desc: When a couple hires their surrogate as a nanny, they form a strong bond, causing the sister-in-law to become increasingly jealous. Soon, a web of lies entangles the three women.

programme.title: Coffee Wars
programme.desc: A fun comedy film. A vegan coffee shop owner and her team of misfits gear up as the underdogs for the World Barista Championships.

programme.title: The Royal

programme.title: Madagascar

programme.title: Final Destination

programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. May Yacoubi's most precious memories are from when she's hosting delicious banquets for friends and family. Now, she shares her tasty, diverse and crowd-pleasing recipes.

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: 'S5/E9 - Head Over Heels'. Dr. Jeff visits a free clinic and returns with a dog who was hit by a car. Plus, he helps a dog with a mysterious lump and Dr. Baier wants to keep a rescue puppy.

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - The Cutest Yak In Colorado'. Dr. Jeff treats a cherished Bloodhound puppy that won't eat. Plus, Dr. Petra comes to the rescue of a cat after it swallowed a handful of hair ties.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Memorial Day Madness'. Eight superb bakers take on springtime treats in an exciting baking competition. Who will win the title of Spring Baking Champion and take home $50,000?

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Deck Party'. The team show how to grill the perfect steak and create a colourful pasta salad with seasonal vegetables and two recipes with jarred and fresh artichokes.

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - Ready To Roll'. Dr. Jeff and the team head to a remote town offering low-cost care to pets. Plus, Dr. Petra performs life-saving surgery on a Basset Hound that was hit by a car.

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: 'S16/E1 - Bear Rescue'. Wildlife agents are called out to rescue a black bear that has been hit by a car. Meanwhile, investigators confront the owner of an illegal pig slaughter operation.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - The Great Turtle Comeback'. Following surgery, Olga the ostrich is ready to be reunited with her flock. A new squirrel monkey arrives at the zoo and a crowd-pleasing warthog returns!

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S20/E4 - Salt Pearls Of Wisdom'. The judges compare shrimp and chickpea appetizers. In the next round, baklava causes issues as the chefs try to find ways to use salt pearls in their dishes.

programme.title: Street Food In Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. There is a rich culture and history of street food in Africa. Chef Nti explores the delicious dishes on offer and recreates some of her favourite recipes.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Memorial Day Bash'. For a summer barbecue, the gang share a great new recipe for a killer burger and barbecue ribs. Plus, poolside snacks and a classic Long Island Iced Tea.

programme.title: Rehab Addict
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Boarded Up Beauty'. Nicole Curtis is on a mission to restore condemned properties. She takes on a boarded-up 1880s house with a tiny bathroom and a basement full of structural issues.

programme.title: Rehab Addict
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Kitchen Cabinets Remade'. Nicole gets creative as she turns her attention to the kitchen. She must figure out how to update and reuse stock cabinets and repair the pine sub-floor.

programme.title: Rehab Addict
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - A Bright, Open Living Room'. Nicole continues to restore a condemned house from the 1880s. She plans to turn a duplex back into a single-family home and fixes a stained-glass window.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - The Devil Made Me Do It'. Robert Schwartz is killed in his home, stabbed 32 times with an 'X' carved into his neck. It seems a ritualistic murder but the culprit is closer to home.

programme.title: Scorned: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - A Playbook For Murder'. Sam and Mirinda are a well-liked couple. But the former cheerleader has a taste for betrayal and it sends her right into the arms of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Inside The Force: 24/7
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Sgt Dan Cooper has to push his emergency button for back up when a man who resists arrest gets out of control and DC George Wynn deals with the fallout of those who have drunk too much.

programme.title: Curious And Unusual Deaths
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Didn't See Death Coming'. An alarming look at how an aspiring wrestler died after wearing a rubber suit in a sauna. Also the story of how a cook met her maker while boiling beetroot.

programme.title: World's Most Unexplained
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Spontaneous Human Combustion'. Can the human body really catch fire without cause? It's a phenomenon that's been reported since ancient times but science can't explain it and dismisses those that try.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: 'S6/E13 - Series 6, Episode 13'. Graeme heads back down memory lane to revisit a seriously pampered pooch he first met a few years back - Great Dane Trip.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: 'S6/E2'. Reality series about the New Zealand Customs agents who aim to prevent pest plants, animals, drugs and pornography filtering through the country's borders.

programme.title: Border Force USA: The Bridges
programme.desc: 'S5/E10'. One hundred and twenty kilos of cocaine is discovered in the axles of a lowboy trailer, and two men are caught attempting to smuggle a rooster for cock-fighting.

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Ashes To Ashes'. Kelly Lives in an 18th century cottage on the edge of the Forest of Dean. The team quickly identify two male entities, one spirit is trapped but which one and why?

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Playing With The Devil'. The team have been called in to investigate a 17th century grade 2 listed pub called the Black Dog. Landlord Chris Knowles has been there for nine years and is petrified to enter the attic.

programme.title: Eating Ourselves to Death
programme.desc: Obesity currently kills more people than road traffic accidents, terrorist attacks and Alzheimer's disease combined, this documentary follows three young people struggling with obesity.

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: It's Topical
programme.desc: Viewers get to air their opinions on the big stories of the day or week. It's Topical gives you a sense of the nation's mood. Digital, pacy, interactive and engaging journalism brought to the TV screen.

programme.title: The Late Edition
programme.desc: A 360 view of all the stories that made headlines through packages, features, and interviews. This is also a platform for late-night breaking stories and or any developing news stories through the night.

programme.title: Democracy 30
programme.desc: An SABC News and current affairs programme that truthfully and impartially tells the South African story of the past 30 years, reflecting the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Stories Untold
programme.desc: We celebrate inspirational stories of ordinary people who overcame the odds and ultimately become agents for social change in healing the nation.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Morning Live focuses on what South Africans are waking up to on the day. The show carries the Diary for the day, Market Sense, General News, Crime and Courts issues, Political issues, Sports News, Live weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: On Point
programme.desc: On Point follows the development of the general news of the day in-depth where the show informs viewers on the further developments on the stories. This is a blended segment with 2 hours of general news and markets segment for an hour.

programme.title: SA Today

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.desc: A 360 view of all the stories that made headlines through packages, features, and interviews. This is also a platform for late-night breaking stories and or any developing news stories through the night.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Zuri Had a Little Lamb'. Lou assigns Zuri and Emma to barn duty. The boys discover Gladys has been hiding a secret in the woods.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - Zuri Weasels Out'. To Zuri's dismay, Hazel makes her a trainee counsellor in the Weasel cabin. Meanwhile Jorge and Griff convince Ravi that the camp's horse has a hidden talent.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Christmas Story'. Jessie's employers are late coming home for Christmas, and ask her to do the last minute present shopping. But when she does, the store thinks she's stolen the credit card and she and the kids are arrested.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - 1/4'. Luke needs a new member of his paintball team at short notice. Jessie would love to be part of Team Zombie but Luke only thinks of her as a nanny.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E63 - Tesscue Me'. Booker and Nia want to attend a high school party that Tess is going to, but Raven has already set up a game night.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S2/E37 - Robostus'. Markov, a small, sensitive robot, is akumatized into Robostus, a villain who brings inanimate objects to life. Can our heroes reason with this very humane robot?

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Lamp Sweet Lamp'. The roles are switched on the Isle of the Lost when it's the AKs that don't fit in, while the VKs bond over their rotten ways.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Goat Your Own Way/The Very Hungry Ghost'. Molly insists on training an unruly goat the 'Molly way'. When the McGees celebrate a Thai holiday about feeding 'hungry ghosts', Scratch tries to keep the feast all to himself.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Scare Tactics/The Bad Boy Bobby Daniels'. When Scratch ditches class to goof off with Geoff, he struggles to pass his Scare Test. Molly and Scratch try to reunite Patty with her old flame: The Bad Boy Bobby Daniels.

programme.title: Monsters at Work
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Cover Up'. When Fritz goes on vacation and leaves Duncan in charge, MIFT causes a power outage and an inspector is called to investigate.

programme.title: Chip 'n' Dale: Park Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Too Late to Hibernate/Sorry Nut Sorry/Never Trust a Sausage'. Dale tricks Chip into hibernating so he can get some alone time. / Chip breaks the TV and frames Dale for it. / Dale betrays Chip's trust.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E1 - Stormy Weather'. The loser of a kids-channel contest gets akumatized by Hawk Moth. Now Stormy Weather, she takes revenge on all those who did not vote for her.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S1/E2 - The Bubbler'. Nino is angry with Adrien's father and Hawk Moth uses that anger to turn him into The Bubbler, who makes adults disappear. Will Ladybug and Cat Noir escape his bubbles?

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E74 - Frilly Tilly/Montaged'. Tilly changes her country's coming-of-age ceremony and Gramma is NOT having it. Cricket fast-tracks his training for a rodeo and gets trapped in a never-ending montage.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E75 - Pizza Deliverance/Horse Girl'. A pizza delivery girl from Big City must flee from a crazed country family. When Bill gets a horse for the day, Tilly must hide how much she secretly hates horses.

programme.title: Zombies: The Re-animated Series
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Suddenly Seabrook'. Addison, Zed, and Eliza accidentally turn a carnivorous plant into a ferocious, two-headed monster. Can they uproot this vicious vegetation before it devours them and Bucky?

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Zuri Had a Little Lamb'. Lou assigns Zuri and Emma to barn duty. The boys discover Gladys has been hiding a secret in the woods.

programme.title: Jessie

programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Invasion of the Bucky Snatchers/The Dining'. Bucky turns the school into a Bucky-themed dystopia. When Bonzo discovers mysterious blueprints in the diner, he becomes possessed by the desire to build a Spaghetti Waterfall!

programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Training Dae/Youngins & Dragons'. Addison is determined to help Dae, the quirky new witch at school, feel welcome. Zed and little sister Zoey must team up to fight a monster hunter.

programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Family Legacy, Paint Misbehavin''. Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there's treasure buried on their property. Cricket adds his own doodles to Gloria's abstract paintings in the café.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - 1/15'. Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country!

programme.title: A Passion For Revenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E112 of 160 - 1/112'. Cayetana proposes a plan to Isadora, hoping to separate Arturo and Sofia once and for all. Flavio admits to Irina that he is crazy about her.

programme.title: Ana's New Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 91 - 1/8'. Adelaida plans to move and asks Genoveva for help as a real estate agent. Ana demands that Horacio allow Emma's internship.

programme.title: Queen Of The South

programme.title: Iron Rose

programme.title: World Wide Worship
programme.desc: 'E576 - World Wide Worship'. Join the global congregation of worshipers and immerse yourself in a diverse collection of gospel songs that unite believers worldwide.

programme.title: Planet Of The Apes
programme.desc: The sudden appearance of one man in a world where apes are in charge and humans are enslaved serves as a challenge to the status quo.

programme.title: Pain And Gain
programme.desc: Michael Bay (Transformers) directs Mark Wahlberg in this violent crime-drama, loosely based on a true story about a group of bodybuilders who extort money from a wealthy businessman.

programme.title: Me Myself & Irene
programme.desc: Charlie is a good-natured Rhode Island cop. His only problem is Hank, an alternate personality who turns Charlie into a nasty, crazy jerk.

programme.title: Seized
programme.desc: After a former special forces agent's son is kidnapped, he must wipe out three dangerous crime syndicates, if he wants to see his son alive again.

programme.title: Dating & New York
programme.desc: After a one-night stand, two New York millennials draw up a 'Best Friends with Benefits' contract to avoid the pitfalls of their past relationships.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: It is the maiden voyage of the most advanced starship ever created. It's young crew must find a way to stop an evil being, whose vengeance threatens all of mankind.

programme.title: Doctor Dolittle
programme.desc: The wild and woolly adventures of the one and only vet who can talk to the animals.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Two intergalactic races of robots crash land on Earth, with the future of humankind hanging in balance as they battle for the ultimate power source.

programme.title: Little Bone Lodge
programme.desc: Two criminals on the run try to find safety in a secluded farmhouse, but soon come to realize that the place is full of dark and twisted secrets.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy stares down pure evil in this supernatural action adventure. A private detective must protect a special boy from dark forces that want the child dead.

programme.title: Gone In Sixty Seconds
programme.desc: Before 'The Fast and the Furious', there was this high-octane film starring Nicolas Cage and Angelina Jolie. A retired car thief must return to the game to save his brother.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A botched mid-air heist results in suitcases full of cash being searched for by various groups throughout the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Explorers
programme.desc: A boy obsessed with '50s sci-fi movies about aliens has a recurring dream about a blueprint of some kind, which he draws for his inventor friend.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: A ruthless mastermind known as Khan declares a one-man war on the Federation and U.S.S. Enterprise embarks on the greatest manhunt in history.

programme.title: The Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Prey'. The team splinters when Tim and Scott attempt to summon a demon despite Sarah and Sapphire's objections. The experiment exposes a new threat directly tied to Karen.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Royal Oak Pub'. Powerful spirits are said to haunt the historic Royal Oak Pub and its owner. Nick and Katrina try to investigate why the spirits are unable to rest in peace.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Strawberry River Inn'. Jack and Katrina head to Skinwalker in Utah. They're investigating a rumoured haunted bed and breakfast, plus they look at paranormal activity in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Scutt Mansion'. After the owner's tragic death, a Victorian mansion is said to curse all who inhabit it. As Nick and Katrina stay at Illinois' most haunted house, do they risk danger?

programme.title: Legends Of The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Shadow Killer'. Kangaroos are mysteriously being mauled in Victoria, Australia. With no big cats in this part of the world, has a long-extinct predator returned?

programme.title: Legends Of The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Executioner Of The Andes'. In Ecuador, a killer is loose in the wild as livestock are being mutilated and left uneaten. Could it be proof the mythical Andean Mountain Wolf exists?

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Sea Witch'. Amy, Adam and Chip investigate reports of an aggressive spirt that's haunting a US Navy destroyer. Can they find answers on this huge and mysterious ship?

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - False Witness'. In 1673, Rebecca Cornell was found dead in her home. Amy, Adam and Chip attempt to conjure the spirits who played a part in this centuries-old crime.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S106/E10 - Cape Town Capers'. After a lifelong obsession with Africa, a woman is moving her family to Cape Town. They need a place that will ease their young children's transition.

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Area 51, Abduction And Monster'. Don Wildman investigates a mysterious plane crash near Area 51, a pilot's encounter with a UFO and evidence that may solve a maritime mystery.

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Grace Kelly And Bunny Man'. Don Wildman investigates the mysterious circumstances surrounding the death of a princess and sightings of a strange half-man, half-rabbit creature.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E1 - Close Encounters'. Josh Gates starts his extra-terrestrial search with a visit to NASA and an alien-hunting expedition in Chile, where scientists make new discoveries.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E2 - Ancient Visitors'. Josh is on Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe aliens visited millennia ago. And, he goes meteorite hunting in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Rocky Mountain Monsters'. Rob examines bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he explores if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - California's Hidden Doomsday'. Rob heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off a mega-quake. Plus, he explores a mysterious sinkhole.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Ancient Astronauts'. Did aliens help build the Pyramids? Or does the 'ancient astronauts' idea go back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenge religion and science?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Founding Fathers'. Discovers which of America's founding fathers used sex as an instrument of diplomacy and which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Rock Apes Of Vietnam'. New evidence reveals a Vietnam War pilot may have returned home with a secret cargo. Experts use this to try and find the missing link in human evolution.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Dracula, King Arthur, The Queen And The Mistress'. A Transylvanian castle provides the chilling inspiration for a literary villain. Plus, a mythical monarch steps-into the real world at an English Abbey.

programme.title: Gold Fever
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Eureka'. The Boston Company, a motley group of gold seekers including Dr. Charles Robinson, make the trek west to the gold fields. Meanwhile, entrepreneur Sam Brannan takes advantage.

programme.title: Gold Fever
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - San Francisco Burning'. The men of the Boston Company discover finding gold is more difficult than they imagined. Meanwhile, Sam's empire expands, but will a huge fire halt progress?

programme.title: Treasure Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Malta'. As the Odyssey team closes in on a multi-million dollar wreck, tensions run high in the exhausted crew. Can they hold it together or are they about blow their bounty?

programme.title: Treasure Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - U-Boats'. The Odyssey crew is hunting for German U-boat submarines in the English Channel. But will mines planted by the Allies decades ago jeopardise their mission?

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Ruby Fever'. All winter long, the miner's dream of the rubies discovered atop an almost impossible-to-reach ridge just as winter's window closes in on them.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Belly Of The Red Beast'. The American miners have their sights set on what team geologist Eric Drummond believes could be the largest ruby deposit in the Arctic.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S10/E4 - Arrow Stork, Terror in the Sky and Feuding Astors'. Don Wildman uncovers the truth behind one of nature's greatest riddles, a doomed space station and a family feud that transformed New York City.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Buried Alive'. Amy, Adam and Chip visit a former United States Army post in Rhode Island. This huge fort is said to be haunted by dead soldiers and victims of various crimes.

programme.title: The Holzer Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Haunting of Lambert Castle'. The team reopens Hans Holzer's investigation of a castle in New Jersey. Their exploration reveals a woman's nightmares may have a supernatural source.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S13/E8 - The Wanderer'. Amy and Steve investigate a Sutter, California, home where paranormal activity terrorises a newlywed couple. The entity will stop at nothing until someone is dead.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Odd Fellows Home'. Alex takes the team to a decaying compound in Missouri that once housed a secret society. It is said that more than 10,000 people have died at this location.

programme.title: Ghost Loop
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Choking Up'. The Spirit Hunters travel to Jones, Alabama, to help a woman who believes a ghost is choking her every night in her sleep. Is a family curse to blame?
